name: 16 · Stream Map
description: Parallel streaming-source Map. A streaming producer (streamOutput=true) emits 4 word chunks (the/quick/brown/fox); a Map in stream-source mode runs a per-chunk Python body that uppercases each chunk CONCURRENTLY (one ephemeral job per chunk), gathers the results in stream order (sized on stream_count), and a trailing joiner concatenates the gathered collection into 'THE QUICK BROWN FOX'. Wire producer.stream → map.stream and producer.out → map.control.
